intent: Ask for a clear explanation of how backpropagation works in neural networks.
Ask how hash tables handle collisions and why that affects performance.
Ask what overfitting is in machine learning and how regularization helps.
Ask for the difference between processes and threads with a practical example.
Ask why time complexity matters and what Big-O means in simple terms.
Ask how to solve a system of two linear equations step by step.
Ask how derivatives are used to find maximum and minimum values in optimization.
Ask how to estimate the load on a simple beam in a basic engineering design.
Ask what the chain rule is and when to apply it.
Ask how Fourier transforms are used in signal processing at a high level.
Ask for the difference between utilitarianism and deontology with a simple case.
Ask what Stoicism teaches about handling emotions and adversity.
Ask whether free will can coexist with determinism in compatibilist views.
Ask what existentialism says about meaning and personal responsibility.
Ask for an explanation of the trolley problem and why philosophers use it.
Ask why the Roman Empire fell and what causes historians debate most.
Ask what triggered the French Revolution and how it changed Europe.
Ask what allegory means in Animal Farm and identify one key example.
Ask how Shakespeare uses soliloquy in Hamlet to reveal character conflict.
Ask how World War I set conditions that contributed to World War II.
Ask how vaccines train the immune system and why boosters are sometimes needed.
Ask what antibiotics do and why they do not work against viruses.
Ask how CRISPR gene editing works in basic biological terms.
Ask what insulin does in the body and how diabetes disrupts that process.
Ask how mRNA is translated into protein in a human cell.
